github.copilot.chat.testGeneration.instr.text: Always load .claude/skills/playwright-test-generator/SKILL.md before generating tests. Use JUnit 5 + Mockito + AssertJ for Java. Use Playwright with Page Object Model for UI. Follow the test patterns in .claude/skills/playwright-test-generator/references/.

github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.inst.text: When reviewing code, check against .claude/skills/code-smell-detector/SKILL.md patterns. Flag God classes, long methods, missing @Transactional, thread safety issues, and N+1 risks.

github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Generate commit messages in the format: type(scope): description. Types: feat, fix, refactor, test, docs, chore, perf, security. Reference the skill used if applicable (e.g. 'refactor(orders): extract OrderValidationService [interactive-refactoring-agent]').
